---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
kmer_counts = read.table("../counts.txt", sep = "|")

kmer_counts$maf = pmin(kmer_counts$V1, kmer_counts$V2)/(kmer_counts$V1 + kmer_counts$V2)

slim = read.table("/global/scratch/users/milesroberts/moi_lab_projects/poolseq-kmers/workflow/slim_results/allele_freqs_1_0.txt", sep = " ")

slim$maf = pmin(slim$V6, 1 - slim$V6)

cor.test(kmer_counts$maf, slim$maf)

plot(kmer_counts$maf, slim$maf)
abline(a = 0, b = 1)
```
